description: Clean PR. Fully satisfies all criteria. No memory violations. No security issues.

input.pr_body: Adds structured logging to all payment requests. Fixes #16

mock_fixtures.pr_diff:
--- a/src/payment_processor.py
+++ b/src/payment_processor.py
@@ -12 +12 @@
+        logger.info('Processing payment', extra={'merchant_id': request.merchant_id, 'amount_cents': request.amount_cents})
+        logger.error('Payment failed', extra={'error_code': exc.error_code})
mock_fixtures.issue_body:
## Acceptance Criteria
1. Log payment_id and merchant_id on every request at INFO level
2. Log ERROR level on payment failure with error_code
3. Sensitive fields (card numbers, CVV) must never appear in logs
